step_rationale: Endothelial destabilization, vascular permeability; post-MI heart failure mediator.
mechanism: Angiopoietin-2 promotes endothelial activation and vascular instability, destabilizing the coronary endothelium and exacerbating post-MI remodeling.

references.title: Plasma Interleukin-6 (IL-6), Angiopoietin-2, and C-Reactive Protein Levels Predict Subsequent Type 1 Myocardial Infarction in Persons With Treated HIV Infection.
references.journal: Journal of acquired immune deficiency syndromes (1999)

references.title: The Effect of Protease-Activated Receptor-1 (PAR-1) Inhibition on Endothelial-Related Biomarkers in Patients with Coronary Artery Disease.
Prioritizing Candidates of Post-Myocardial Infarction Heart Failure Using Plasma Proteomics and Single-Cell Transcriptomics.
Angiopoietin-2 and Survival in Peripheral Artery Disease Patients.
